label: Intake Pipeline
info:
End-to-end intake: Webhook → Slack → SignNow packet → Signing link → Confirmation.
No manual steps. Fully automated from intake to bond posting.

name: 🔄 END-TO-END INTAKE PIPELINE
info:
Webhook → Validate → Slack Alert → Create SignNow Packet → Send Signing Link → Confirm.
Fully automated — no manual steps needed.

name: ✅ Validate Intake
📢 Slack: New Intake
📝 Create Packet
📤 Send Signing Link
✅ Pipeline Complete

label: Revenue Snapshot
info: Daily at 6 PM — pulls payment data, calculates revenue stats, sends to Slack + Telegram.

name: 💰 DAILY REVENUE SNAPSHOT
info:
6 PM daily — pulls payment data from GAS/SwipeSimple.
Calculates daily/weekly/monthly stats.
Sends to Slack + Telegram.

name: 📊 Fetch Revenue
📈 Calculate Stats
📢 Format Report

label: The Scout
info:
Geographic expansion — scrapes county jails for new arrest data.
Targets counties beyond current coverage.
Feeds into Bounty Hunter for lead scoring.

name: 🔭 THE SCOUT — GEOGRAPHIC EXPANSION
info:
Daily 5 AM scan of expansion county jails.
Targets: Sarasota, Manatee, Glades, DeSoto, Highlands.
High-value arrests get routed to Bounty Hunter.

name: 🗺️ Build Target List
📊 Parse Results
📢 Scout Report

label: Staff Performance
info: Weekly staff performance report — response times, cases closed, revenue per agent.

name: 📊 STAFF PERFORMANCE
info:
Weekly (Friday 5 PM) — tracks response times, cases closed, revenue.
Builds a leaderboard and posts to Slack.

name: 📊 Fetch Metrics
🏆 Build Leaderboard
📢 Format Report

label: Weather Posting
info:
Adjusts social posting based on local weather and events.
Storms + holidays = higher arrest rates = more posts.

name: 🌤️ WEATHER-BASED POSTING
info:
6 AM daily — checks weather + events.
Storms, holidays, weekends → extra social posts.
Uses free Open-Meteo API for Fort Myers weather.

name: 🌡️ Fetch Weather
📊 Analyze & Decide
📢 Slack Report
